title: PRESCHOOL PROMISE - 211info
text: EARLY LEARNING MULTNOMAH PRESCHOOL PROMISE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps locate publicly funded preschools in family care, center, and school settings. Eligible students are matched to sites based on family preference and need. Setting options include days, hours of operation, transportation, primary language, bilingual programs, curriculum, and approach. 619 SW 11th Avenue Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Openings in Preschool Promise are available to: -Families with children ages 3 and 4 -Children currently on waiting lists for other publicly funded preschool options -Families served by ODHS (TANF and child welfare) -Families living at or below 200% federal poverty level (FPL) -Families living above 200% FPL, with adjustments for housing -Families receiving SNAP do not need to provide additional income verification -Housing Adjustment: Eligibility Specialists may adjust a family’s gross income calculation when determining eligibility to account for excessive housing costs. This applies to families who do not meet income eligibility but spend more than 30% of their gross income on housing costs Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 226-9309 -. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 226-9309 Michelle Nelson [email protected] Alternate (503) 226-9346 Jorge Guzman [email protected] Alternate (503) 226-9305 Parent Help Line [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information or to complete application FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, proof of address LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Child Care Expense Assistance * Foster Children Child Care Expense Assistance * Preschool Age Children Preschool Referral Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - MULTNOMAH EARLY LEARNING HUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EARLY LEARNING MULTNOMAH
